title: Moonlight Magic Tools CIT
description: A texture pack that remodels your tools after renaming them in the anvil!
body:
## Moonlight Magic Tools CIT

This texture Pack  will remodel the Tools after renaming them in an anvil, [Catalog in Media Gallery] to be Moonlight Magic Themed. Special for this pack is the Wand that will replace the Bonemeal texture and let's you run around with a magical Wand to bonemeal your world! :D

This pack **NEEDS** cit resewn or any alternatives that run custom item textures!

If you encounter any problems please check the help/questions channel in the discord! <3

This pack got tested in Version 1.20 & 1.20.1, should be compatible with any other version that uses the same folder structure as those versions tho! Before you ask if another version works please check yourself before asking, I would do the same :D.
